query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_sent FROM recruitment_emails_sent WHERE emailKey = 're_engagement_june_2026'; SELECT MIN(sentAt) as first_sent, MAX(sentAt) as last_sent FROM recruitment_emails_sent WHERE emailKey = 're_engagement_june_2026';
